---
title: "Rong's Notes"
---

This is a Quarto website for long-term notes, reading records, methods, and project knowledge.

The source files will live under `src/` and are edited as `.qmd` files. Chinese or bilingual titles can be used inside each note's YAML front matter.

Use `draft: true` in a note's YAML header when a file should stay unpublished.


[example](02-sigma-field)
